title: Is anyone else getting errors to formulas that should work?
excerpt:
I am trying to use the following formula on several boards, it works on one, but not the others. 
text(divide({Menu Price},{Food Cost}),“0.0%”)

posts.author: MeghanVincent (Meghan Vincent)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use the following formula on several boards, it works on one, but not the others.
text(divide({Menu Price},{Food Cost}),“0.0%”)

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MeghanVincent,

We haven’t received any reports of issues with the formula column. Would you be able to send a screenshot of your setup or let us know the specific columns you’re using so we can test this on our end?
